measured.transcript: Are we standing on a chair? Well, since you guys have chosen the ones I wanted to do, I'll have to go for something a bit random. And also my drawing skill isn't that great. Well, as you can see, the quality of the work today is... I think it's outstandingly good. Okay, now I'm going to have to change what it was originally going to be because that looks like a beak now. Crocodile? Yeah, it can be a crocodile. It can be a crocodile. Firstly, it was an attempt at a T-Rex and then it sort of changed into a pelican, but it can be a crocodile. That's lovely. Yeah, and I'll have to think on the spot of things that it is. Scary... Strong... Yeah, that's about it, I think. Okay. I'm very impressed with your artistic skills. Mine are dreadful. Oops, this is now coming apart. Let me just wait a bit. I'll put the top in. I hope that clicks in. I'll hold it on. Oops. Oh dear. What happened there? Technical help. Hopefully that'll stay on. Two-handed version. Okay. Again, this is off the top of my head. I was going to do a big cat too. Oh dear. It doesn't look like what I want it to be. It's not a vampire bat, honestly. And somewhere there's a body behind. That's my dreadful... That's the worst... Yeah, that's meant to be an eagle. Right. Not a seagull. You can tell it's a flying animal. Could have been a seagull. I never thought of a seagull. An eagle. Again, I'm thinking on my feet. Goodness. I suppose they're also independent. I'll put that one down again. They're good at golf. Independent. Right. Did you say they're good at golf? Yeah. Are they? Eagle. Oh, right. Okay. I'm not good at golf. I'll say they're quite free-spirited. Flying around everywhere. Doing their own thing. And birds of prey, aren't they? Oh dear. Intrepid. Intrepid. There we go. I hope that pen's going to be okay. Whoops. Okay. That was fine. Right. Finance-wise, we've got a selling price at 25 euros, which I don't actually know what that is in pounds at all. Any ideas? It's about... 17? 1.4. 1.4 euro would make about a pound or something. Yeah, yeah. Something like that. Yeah, about 17. 15? 17 pounds. Okay. Should we be making notes of this? We can just refer to this later, can't we? I think so. I think so. I'd be able to pull it up or... Okay. ... have it in the chat. Yeah. I think we should have a share of the... Having said that, though, if you want to get one of those, the ones on the market at the moment, they're about 20 pounds anyway. Right. So... Yeah. We have to buy one. So I suppose later it depends if we want to undercut the price, or is it going to make our product look a cheapy-cheapy option? Yeah. Production costs at 12.50. Okay. Pretty huge margin. So half of the selling price is taken up by building it. Mm-hmm. And then we have to... And the profit aim is 50 million euros, which is... In our first year? Yes. Yeah. I presume so. You've got market range international, and you did say earlier it's got to be accessible and usable by sort of all age groups. Just... We're not focusing on business market or any particular thing. It's everyone, user-friendly to everyone. Yeah. Mm-hmm. So... Yeah. Yeah. I don't think we have to... I don't think it's a case of worrying about different...
